news.title:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.
Muted stock reaction reflects cautious IT sector sentiment; Nifty IT index flat, Infosys and Coforge lagging.
news.summary:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.

news.title:
AI-driven productivity tools disrupt Indian IT's manpower-driven revenue model, sparking investor anxiety.
BSE IT Index fell 22% over the past year; firms like TCS, Infosys, HCL impacted.

news.title:
Punjab to showcase Rs 27,294 crore investments at Progressive Punjab Summit with 30 projects creating 47,067 jobs.
Key projects include Tata Steel's Rs 3,200 crore Ludhiana plant and Infosys' Rs 286 crore Mohali campus expansion.

news.title:

news.title:
Top 10 firms lost ₹2.81-lakh cr in mcap; SBI faced the biggest hit with ₹53,952.96 cr erosion.

news.title:
Infosys, Persistent, Mphasis shares rise as rupee hits record low of 92.28/USD, boosting margins.
Nifty IT index up 20% YTD; IT stocks rebound from 52-week lows, Persistent gains 12%, Mphasis up 10%.

news.title:
Infosys promoters increased stake from 14.3% to 14.5% in Q3 FY26; net profit dropped 2.2% due to labor code charges.
Godrej Industries promoters hiked stake by 3.3%, nearing 75% limit; revenue hit Rs 50,512m and profit rose to Rs 2,413m.
news.summary:
Infosys promoters increased stake from 14.3% to 14.5% in Q3 FY26; net profit dropped 2.2% due to labor code charges.
Godrej Industries promoters hiked stake by 3.3%, nearing 75% limit; revenue hit Rs 50,512m and profit rose to Rs 2,413m.

news.title:
Infosys shares plunge 20.3% in Feb, marking worst monthly drop since 2013 due to AI disruption concerns.
Market cap falls ₹1.33 lakh cr; mutual funds incur ₹41,892 cr notional losses amid heavy IT sector sell-off.
news.summary:
Infosys shares plunge 20.3% in Feb, marking worst monthly drop since 2013 due to AI disruption concerns.
Market cap falls ₹1.33 lakh cr; mutual funds incur ₹41,892 cr notional losses amid heavy IT sector sell-off.

news.title:
Infosys ADR rose 3.2%, leading a rebound in software stocks globally.
Wipro ADR gained 2.2%, while Accenture and Cognizant rose 8% and 6% respectively.
news.summary:
Infosys ADR rose 3.2%, leading a rebound in software stocks globally.

news.title:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.
news.summary:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.
